isolation.storageIsolation: single dedicated agent-browser session with localStorage scoped to this session

assertionResults.title: Nonce-pool 'Trigger Sync' overlay surfaces during refill

steps.action: Capture baseline nonce/UI state on dashboard
steps.expected: No nonce sync overlay before depletion simulation
steps.observed: Baseline had nonceSnapshot {nonce_pool_size:70, nonce_pool_threshold:1} and no 'Syncing nonces'/'Trigger Sync' text

steps.expected: Syncing nonces + Trigger Sync overlay appears while depleted
steps.observed: During state showed nonceSnapshot {0,8}, sign_ready=false, degraded_reasons included nonce_pool_depleted, and both overlay strings rendered

steps.expected: Overlay clears once pool is back above threshold
steps.observed: After restore, nonceSnapshot returned to {70,1}, sign_ready=true, and overlay strings were absent

evidence.network: m1-ops/r3-g1-ops-overlay-keyboard/network-requests.txt (No requests captured); relay runtime validated via in-app readiness against ws://127.0.0.1:8194

assertionResults.title: All OPS surfaces are keyboard reachable

steps.action: Populate valid dev-panel inputs and run Tab trace from Recover through OPS controls
steps.expected: Refresh peers, Test Sign, Test ECDH, Ping, Refresh All are all reachable in Tab order with visible focus
steps.observed: Trace reached all five controls in order; focused entries show outline/box-shadow focus-ring styles and controls were enabled

steps.action: Activate Refresh peers, Test Sign, Ping, Refresh All with Enter
steps.expected: Keyboard Enter activation dispatches equivalent operations
steps.observed: Enter on Refresh peers produced Ping pending request_id 4dd8d3d3082c456a2a17179a9729cda4; Enter on Test Sign produced sign dispatch request_id a07a2b2a1a88f893c3ee3da02a3764e4 with completed lifecycle; Enter on Ping produced ping dispatch request_id fdf6ed1d55145aadfb13c1d30e2c9f9c; Enter on Refresh All rotated ping pending request_id to 8bd602dfd80f6386060f38a0983d43cb

steps.expected: Keyboard Space activation dispatches equivalent ECDH operation
steps.observed: Space on Test ECDH produced pendingDispatchIndex ecdh request_id fefd755d08477ddec685867ddb4d80f6 for peer bd242ec568fd1c447d4fd3a08349d578e94cbaf51f6fd02825cf616af5fce169

evidence.network: m1-ops/r3-g1-ops-overlay-keyboard/network-requests.txt (No requests captured); keyboard assertions validated via runtime observables

frictions.description: Tab traversal can start from the last focused element if focus is not reset, which can make the initial order look offset.
frictions.resolution: Anchored focus on the top-level Recover button and captured a deterministic Tab trace from that point.

frictions.description: Single-tab dashboard context did not provide a dispatch-capable runtime for these assertions.
frictions.resolution: Used DEV hooks to seed paired runtimes across two tabs in the same isolated session via ws://127.0.0.1:8194.
